reroute.primary_recommendation: Immediately divert MV Chennai Star to Visakhapatnam Port and execute Sea→Rail→Road cascade to protect Maruti Manesar assembly line.

sea.reason: Draft 15.2m compatible with Vizag 17.5m limit. Congestion 3/10 vs Chennai 8/10. Berth 7 available.

road.action: Reposition from Chennai Port to Vizag SCR Terminal

air.reason: Rail route viable within 96hr assembly line deadline.

reroute.live_intel: Google Search confirms: Visakhapatnam Port normal operations. No strike action. SCR Train 58501 on schedule per FOIS. NH16 clear per NHAI advisory. Cyclone Mocha trajectory confirmed by IMD toward Chennai coastline.
reroute.geopolitical: Bay of Bengal: no piracy advisories. Red Sea: Houthi risk ongoing but does not affect Chennai-Vizag coastal route.
reroute.social_impact: Protects 340 dock worker shifts at Vizag, 4200 Maruti engine blocks prevent 2300-worker plant shutdown, cold chain for Cipla medical supplies to 3 rural AP hospitals maintained.
reroute.tidal: Vizag tidal window 22hrs/day. Vessel draft 15.2m within 17.5m limit. No anchoring wait required.

captain_report.recommended_action: Reduce to 8kn, alter course 15° north to skirt squall edge
captain_report.summary: MV Chennai Star hit squall at 13.52N 83.21E. 12hr delay. Cargo intact. Reroute recommended.

container_vision.damage_description: Minor surface corrosion on lower panels. Structural integrity intact.
